---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug in SynapseHub
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- SynapseHub version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Rust version: [e.g. 1.77.0]

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, attach screenshots or relevant log excerpts (remove any sensitive tokens/paths).

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem.
